claim: MCPs (Linear MCP, Zapier MCP, Firecol MCP) enable Devin to act as a team of personal assistants by connecting to hundreds of applications.
actionable: Use multiple MCPs with Devin to automate workflows across tools like Linear, Notion, Google Sheets, and Google Docs.
source_title: Using the Linear MCP with Devin

claim: Devin can create Linear tickets with specific labels, priorities, and projects through the Linear MCP when prompted via Slack.
actionable: Mention Devin in a Slack message with a request to create a ticket; Devin will automatically apply labels, priority, and project.
source_title: Using the Linear MCP with Devin

claim: Devin can scrape data from the internet using MCPs and then populate Google Sheets with the collected information.
actionable: Ask Devin to scrape specific data and populate a Google Sheet; it will use the appropriate MCPs to fetch and insert data.
source_title: Using the Linear MCP with Devin
